positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest scene. The foreground features towering, bioluminescent flora with vibrant, saturated purple and turquoise glowing elements. In the mid-ground, silhouetted trees are draped with swirling cosmic mist and faint constellations. The background shows a deep indigo and sapphire nebula gradient. The composition should be central and symmetrical, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast against a slightly gradient sky. Style: Geometric abstract art meets Japanese woodblock print aesthetic, with crisp linework and graphic depth. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting from the luminous elements, creating stark contrast and an ethereal glow. Suitable for screen printing on dark apparel.
negative: blur, artifact, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, low resolution, extra limbs, dirty, clutter, messy
